001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service;
002
003import android.content.Context;
004import androidx.room.Room;
005import dagger.Module;
006import dagger.Provides;
007import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
008import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
009import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.CollectedFossilDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteGridDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao;
015import jakarta.inject.Singleton;
016
017/**
018 * Hilt module that provides database dependencies including the Room database instance and all DAO
019 * interfaces.
020 */
021@Module
022@InstallIn(SingletonComponent.class)
023public class DatabaseModule {
024
025  /**
026   * Provides a singleton instance of the Fossil Sweeper database.
027   *
028   * @param context Application context.
029   * @return FossilSweeperDatabase instance.
030   */
031  @Provides
032  @Singleton
033  FossilSweeperDatabase provideDatabase(@ApplicationContext Context context) {
034    return Room
035        .databaseBuilder(context, FossilSweeperDatabase.class, FossilSweeperDatabase.DATABASE_NAME)
036        .build();
037  }
038
039  /**
040   * Provides the DAO for fossil operations.
041   *
042   * @param db Database instance.
043   * @return FossilDao instance.
044   */
045  @Provides
046  @Singleton
047  FossilDao provideFossilDao(FossilSweeperDatabase db) {
048    return db.getFossilDao();
049  }
050
051  /**
052   * Provides the DAO for collected fossil operations.
053   *
054   * @param db Database instance.
055   * @return CollectedFossilDao instance.
056   */
057  @Provides
058  @Singleton
059  CollectedFossilDao provideCollectedFossilDao(FossilSweeperDatabase db) {
060    return db.getCollectedFossilDao();
061  }
062
063  /**
064   * Provides the DAO for user profile operations.
065   *
066   * @param db Database instance.
067   * @return UserProfileDao instance.
068   */
069  @Provides
070  @Singleton
071  UserProfileDao provideUserProfileDao(FossilSweeperDatabase db) {
072    return db.getUserProfileDao();
073  }
074
075  /**
076   * Provides the DAO for dig site grid operations.
077   *
078   * @param db Database instance.
079   * @return DigSiteGridDao instance.
080   */
081  @Provides
082  @Singleton
083  DigSiteGridDao provideDigSiteGridDao(FossilSweeperDatabase db) {
084    return db.getDigSiteGridDao();
085  }
086
087  /**
088   * Provides the DAO for dig site square operations.
089   *
090   * @param db Database instance.
091   * @return DigSiteSquareDao instance.
092   */
093  @Provides
094  @Singleton
095  DigSiteSquareDao provideDigSiteSquareDao(FossilSweeperDatabase db) {
096    return db.getDigSiteSquareDao();
097  }
098
099}
